ST. LOUIS, No. Nov. 17---.
Czarism is a term that has been
coined in labor lore that made its
appearance in, a mysterious man.
ner in the American Federation of
Labor convention today. Nobody
knows where it came from or what
it's exact mission is. A delegate
from Waycross. Ga, is credited
with having declared that the pres
ent officers of the federation are
"czaristic" and that Gompers is a
Joe Cannon, in fact, because he ap-
points all committees and virtually
names the chairlnen thereof and
appoints and directs the organizers
and performs a few other stunts
that are calculated to give him a
perpetual grip on the federation
machinery.


1t must be admitted that the in
surgent sentiment in the political
field has made itself felt in the Ia
Dor movement and that there is a
feeling of opposition growing
among the conservatives that may
develop into a revolt similar to
that which split the G. o. P. wide
open recently.


The radicals always have been
opposed to Gompers and his admin
istration upon the ground of prin-
ciple. and they seem to be more
largely represented at this conven-
ton than at an yother heretofor.
The younger element is clamorous
that the principals be opposed for
reelection. The delegates vino
